summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of L'Apprenti Boulanger interactive activities enhancement completed successfully. All 13 required features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: Activities page loads at /activites with 4 level buttons (SAP, Émotion, BP, BM)
Level selector changes the displayed level description and activities correctly
BM level button shows appropriate expert-level difficulty activities
Drag & Drop activity opens with left/right columns and bread defect images from technomitron.aainb.com
Hangman game opens with image, clue, letter buttons (A-Z), hangman SVG, hearts for lives
Crossword puzzle opens with interactive grid, clues panel, input cells
Diagnostic Case opens with technomitron image and multiple choice questions
Technical Cards page shows thumbnail images for defects and full images when expanded
Source credit 'technomitron.aainb.com' properly displayed on expanded cards
Navigation includes new Activités link and functions correctly
Home page shows Activités interactives as first mode card
All existing features still work (Training, Diagnostic, Quiz, Profile pages)
Back button in activities returns to activity selection grid
Different pedagogical levels (SAP vs BM) show appropriate content complexity
Interactive elements clickable and properly integrated
Images from technomitron.aainb.com load and display correctly throughout
